# Sub-Level 36.1

### **Description**

This level covers the same concepts using simpler three-digit numbers and shorter sequences. 

Students receive greater visual support while practicing place value and number patterns.

## **Sections**

### **Section A: Hundreds, Tens & Ones**

**Examples**

243

Hundreds \= \_\_\_

Tens \= \_\_\_

Ones \= \_\_\_

### **Section B: Build Numbers**

**Examples**

2 Hundreds \+ 5 Tens \+ 1 One \= \_\_\_

### **Section C: Missing Numbers**

198 \_\_ 200

541 \_\_ 543

### **Section D: Sequences**

210, 211, \_\_\_

330, 340, \_\_\_
